description: Database migration 012_batch3_features.sql for all 10 new features: offline sync queue, resident tablet requests, QR room codes, benchmarking KPIs, board pack reports, staff performance metrics, e-learning modules/quizzes/certificates, competency sign-off assessments, diabetes management (glucose logs, insulin doses, HbA1c), and palliative care pathway tables.
steps: Create backend/migrations/012_batch3_features.sql with CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS uuid-ossp at the top

Add offline_sync_queue table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, user_id UUID FK, entity_type VARCHAR(50), entity_id UUID, action VARCHAR(20) (create/update/delete), payload JSONB, status VARCHAR(20) (pending/synced/conflict), conflict_resolution JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, synced_at TIMESTAMPTZ

Add resident_tablet_requests table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, request_type VARCHAR(50) (help/meal_rating/activity_choice/video_call/entertainment), payload JSONB, status VARCHAR(20) (pending/acknowledged/completed), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, acknowledged_at TIMESTAMPTZ, acknowledged_by UUID

Add qr_room_codes table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, room_number VARCHAR(20), qr_code_data TEXT, active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Add unique index on (care_home_id, room_number)

Add benchmarking_kpis table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, period_start DATE, period_end DATE, metric_name VARCHAR(100), metric_value DECIMAL(12,4), national_average DECIMAL(12,4), peer_average DECIMAL(12,4), percentile_rank INT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Index on (care_home_id, metric_name, period_start)

Add board_pack_reports table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, report_month DATE, title VARCHAR(200), sections JSONB, status VARCHAR(20) (draft/final/approved), generated_by UUID FK, approved_by UUID, generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ

Add staff_performance_metrics table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, staff_id UUID FK, period_start DATE, period_end DATE, task_completion_rate DECIMAL(5,2), care_note_quality_score DECIMAL(5,2), avg_response_time_minutes INT, training_completion_pct DECIMAL(5,2), notes_count INT, tasks_completed INT, tasks_assigned INT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Index on (care_home_id, staff_id, period_start)

Add elearning_modules table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, title VARCHAR(200), description TEXT, category VARCHAR(100), content_type VARCHAR(50) (video/document/interactive), content_url TEXT, duration_minutes INT, mandatory BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, created_by UUID, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ
Add elearning_quizzes table: id UUID PK, module_id UUID FK, title VARCHAR(200), questions JSONB, pass_mark_pct INT DEFAULT 80, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ

Add elearning_completions table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, module_id UUID FK, staff_id UUID FK, quiz_score INT, passed BOOLEAN, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, certificate_id VARCHAR(100), expiry_date DATE. Unique on (module_id, staff_id, completed_at)

Add competency_signoffs table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, staff_id UUID FK, competency_id UUID, assessor_id UUID FK, observation_date DATE, outcome VARCHAR(20) (competent/not_yet_competent/requires_training), evidence_notes TEXT, further_training_needed TEXT, signed_off BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, signed_off_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ

Add glucose_readings table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, reading_value DECIMAL(5,1), reading_type VARCHAR(30) (before_breakfast/after_breakfast/before_lunch/after_lunch/before_dinner/after_dinner/bedtime/random), recorded_by UUID FK, recorded_at TIMESTAMPTZ, notes TEXT

Add insulin_doses table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, insulin_type VARCHAR(100), dose_units DECIMAL(5,1), injection_site VARCHAR(50), administered_by UUID FK, administered_at TIMESTAMPTZ, notes TEXT

Add diabetes_alerts table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, alert_type VARCHAR(30) (hypo/hyper), glucose_value DECIMAL(5,1), triggered_at TIMESTAMPTZ, acknowledged_by UUID, acknowledged_at TIMESTAMPTZ, actions_taken TEXT
Add hba1c_records table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, value DECIMAL(4,1), test_date DATE, recorded_by UUID FK, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ

Add palliative_care_plans table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, preferred_place_of_death VARCHAR(100), dnacpr_in_place BOOLEAN, advance_decision BOOLEAN, lasting_power_of_attorney BOOLEAN, spiritual_needs TEXT, preferred_priorities TEXT, comfort_measures TEXT, status VARCHAR(20) (active/completed/withdrawn), created_by UUID FK, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ

Add comfort_rounds table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, scheduled_time TIMESTAMPTZ, completed_time TIMESTAMPTZ, completed_by UUID FK, pain_score INT, comfort_notes TEXT, repositioned BOOLEAN, fluids_offered BOOLEAN, mouth_care BOOLEAN

Add anticipatory_medications table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, medication_name VARCHAR(200), indication VARCHAR(100), dose VARCHAR(100), route VARCHAR(50), location_stored VARCHAR(100), prescribed_by VARCHAR(200), prescribed_date DATE, administered_at TIMESTAMPTZ, administered_by UUID, notes TEXT

Add family_communication_log table: id UUID PK, care_home_id UUID FK, resident_id UUID FK, contact_name VARCHAR(200), contact_relationship VARCHAR(100), communication_type VARCHAR(50) (phone/in_person/video/email), summary TEXT, staff_id UUID FK, communication_date TIMESTAMPTZ, follow_up_needed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, follow_up_notes TEXT
Add appropriate indexes on care_home_id, resident_id, staff_id columns for all new tables
acceptance_criteria: File backend/migrations/012_batch3_features.sql exists and contains valid PostgreSQL DDL
All 18+ tables are created with proper FK references
Indexes exist for commonly queried columns
